title: Add animations to subsidy structure, add office address, and add service area

requirements.summary: Add scroll-triggered entrance animations to the subsidy structure section in OdishaGuide.tsx using IntersectionObserver with fade-in and slide-up effects, consistent with BankFinanceBanner animation pattern
acceptanceCriteria: Subsidy structure table rows animate in with fade-in and slide-up on scroll into view
Animation uses IntersectionObserver and CSS keyframes consistent with BankFinanceBanner approach
Animation does not affect layout or readability of the subsidy data

file_operations.description: Add IntersectionObserver-based scroll animation to subsidy structure section. Import and use useState, useEffect, and useRef hooks to track visibility state. Add isVisible state and ref for the subsidy container. In useEffect, create IntersectionObserver with threshold 0.1 to observe the subsidy section, setting isVisible to true when intersecting. Apply conditional className that adds opacity and transform transitions matching the BankFinanceBanner pattern (opacity-0 translate-y-4 to opacity-100 translate-y-0). Wrap subsidy tier tables and related elements in animated container divs. Add transition-all duration-700 ease-out classes and prefers-reduced-motion support using motion-reduce:transition-none and motion-reduce:transform-none utilities.

Add CSS keyframe animations and utility classes for subsidy structure entrance animation if needed beyond Tailwind utilities. Ensure consistency with existing banner-shimmer and other animation patterns. If BankFinanceBanner uses custom keyframes, replicate the same fade-slide-up pattern for subsidy animations. Include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rules to disable animations when users prefer reduced motion.

requirements.summary: Add TRI-GITA SERVICES office address to the Footer component alongside existing contact details
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays the full office address: Shri Hari Niwas, Dengimacha, Near Dengimacha Ministadium, Sambalpur, Odisha 768006
Address is styled consistently with the existing footer contact details
Address is visible on both mobile and desktop layouts

file_operations.description: Add office address entry to the contact details column in the Footer component. Insert a new contact block showing 'Office Address:' label followed by the full address 'Shri Hari Niwas, Dengimacha, Near Dengimacha Ministadium, Sambalpur, Odisha 768006'. Position it after the existing phone and email entries. Use the same typography classes (text-sm, text-gray-300 or equivalent) and layout structure as existing contact items. Ensure the address wraps properly on mobile screens and maintains consistent spacing with other footer elements. Use MapPin or similar icon from lucide-react if other contact items use icons.

requirements.summary: Add 'Service Area: Odisha' entry to the Footer component to clearly communicate geographic coverage
acceptanceCriteria: Service area 'Odisha' is displayed in a prominent, readable location (Footer or relevant section)
Label reads 'Service Area: Odisha' or equivalent clear phrasing
Styling is consistent with surrounding elements

file_operations.description: Add 'Service Area: Odisha' entry to the Footer component. Insert it in the contact details column, either as a separate line item below the office address or as part of the company information section. Use label 'Service Area:' followed by 'Odisha' in the same text styling as other footer contact details. Apply consistent text-sm and color classes (text-gray-300 or equivalent amber/charcoal tokens). Consider adding a MapPin or Globe icon from lucide-react for visual consistency if other items use icons. Ensure the entry is clearly visible on both mobile and desktop layouts.
